Featuring two graceful strands of hand-set round Moissanite stones, this versatile design offers effortless sophistication for weddings, festive occasions, and evening celebrations. The coordinated statement earrings complete the look, making it a perfect choice for women who appreciate understated luxury.
materials: Premium Alloy Base, Round Handcrafted Moissanite (Uncut) Stones, American Diamond (CZ) accents, Adjustable Dori Closure with Beaded Tassels
set_includes: Double-Layer Necklace + Pair of Matching Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Ruhani Ruby Necklace Set
description: Gracefully handcrafted for the modern woman with a love for timeless elegance, the Ruhani Ruby Polki Necklace Set features brilliant uncut Polki stones beautifully paired with rich ruby-colored centerpiece stones. The floral-inspired arrangement of Polki drops creates a regal silhouette, making this necklace ideal for weddings, festive celebrations, receptions, and traditional occasions. Finished with matching statement earrings and an adjustable dori, this set effortlessly blends royal heritage with contemporary sophistication.
materials: Premium Alloy Base, Ruby-Coloured Hydro/Glass Stones (Center Stones), American Diamond (CZ) Accent Stones, Premium Micro CZ Detailing, Adjustable Silk Dori Closure with Beaded Tassels
set_includes: Statement Ruby Necklace + Pair of Matching Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Neelanjana Oxidised Ghungroo Statement Earrings
description: Make a bold statement with the Neelanjana Oxidised Ghungroo Statement Earrings, crafted for women who love timeless artistry. Featuring rich teal cabochon stones, handcrafted Polki-style accents, intricate floral motifs, and cascading antique chain tassels adorned with ghungroo bells, these earrings create graceful movement with every step. Perfect for festive occasions, weddings, Navratri, and Indo-western styling.
product_type: Long Statement Oxidised Earrings (Shoulder Duster Earrings)
materials: Premium Alloy Base, Antique Oxidised Silver Finish, Deep Teal Cabochon Glass/Semi-Precious Style Stone (Top), Handcrafted Polki-Style Glass Stones (White Accent Stones), American Diamond (CZ) Centre Accent, Oxidised Ghungroo Bells, Antique Chain Tassels
set_includes: 1 Pair of Long Statement Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Gulnaar Oxidized Chandbali Earrings
description: Celebrate timeless Indian craftsmanship with the Gulnaar Oxidized Chandbali Earrings. Designed with intricate floral filigree, sparkling kundan-style stones, a soft blush pink center stone, and cascading ghungroo charms, these earrings beautifully blend vintage elegance with contemporary styling. Perfect for festive occasions, weddings, Navratri, and ethnic celebrations, they add graceful movement and artisanal charm to every look.
materials: Premium alloy base with oxidized antique silver finish, Antique gold detailing, Kundan-style white glass stones, Pink teardrop cabochon stone, White glass center stone, Intricate engraved metalwork, Hanging oxidized ghungroo bells
set_includes: 1 Pair of Long Statement Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Noir Heritage Chandbali Earrings
description: Make a bold statement with the Noir Heritage Chandbali Earrings, inspired by timeless Indian craftsmanship. Featuring an antique gold finish with intricate engraved detailing, these earrings are adorned with black teardrop stones, sparkling Polki-style stones, and delicate ghungroo danglers that create graceful movement. A perfect choice for festive occasions, weddings, and Indo-western styling.
materials: Premium alloy base, Antique gold finish, Polki-style uncut glass stones (white), Black teardrop glass stone (centerpiece), High-quality American Diamond/Cubic Zirconia accent stones, Intricate engraved metalwork, Decorative ghungroo danglers, Push-back closure
set_includes: 1 Pair of Statement Chandbali Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Safar Oxidized Camel Cascade Statement Earrings
description: Inspired by the timeless beauty of Rajasthan and desert caravans, the Safar Oxidized Camel Cascade Statement Earrings feature an intricately crafted camel motif, emerald-green cabochon centerpiece, kundan-style accents, and flowing chain tassels adorned with ghungroo bells. These handcrafted statement earrings create graceful movement with every step, making them a perfect choice for festive celebrations, cultural events, and bohemian ethnic styling.
materials: Premium alloy base with antique oxidized silver finish, Handcrafted camel motif detailing, Green oval cabochon stone (emerald-inspired glass stone), Kundan-style white glass stones, Mini pearl detailing around the centerpiece, Oxidized ghungroo bell charms, Long oxidized chain tassels
set_includes: 1 Pair of Oxidized Camel Cascade Statement Earrings

name: The Aarsha's Noor Oxidized Midnight Cascade Earrings
description: Make a bold statement with the Noor Oxidized Midnight Cascade Earrings, featuring an intricately engraved circular centerpiece accented with deep midnight-black cabochon stones, delicate kundan-style highlights, and flowing chain tassels adorned with traditional ghungroo bells. Blending vintage tribal artistry with contemporary elegance, these handcrafted earrings are perfect for festive occasions, cultural celebrations, concerts, and Indo-western styling.
materials: Premium alloy base with antique oxidized silver finish, Black round cabochon glass stones, Black pear-shaped cabochon top stones, Kundan-style white glass accent stone, Handcrafted engraved metal detailing, Long oxidized chain tassels, Traditional oxidized ghungroo bell charms
set_includes: 1 Pair of Oxidized Long Tassel Earrings
